description: Crafted from 100% cotton, this handsome accessory from Quicksilver adds the finishing touch to your casual wear.hat crown made of cotton fabric with eyelets to offer breathable comfort to the headCurved visor with a cotton upper and stitch detailAdjustable strap at the back with an embossed buckle closure to customise the FitEmbroidered brand logo and graphic print on the front of the crown for styleCap careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dry
